nasb.text: for just as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the sea monster, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.

esv.text: For just as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the great fish, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.

cnv.text: 約拿怎樣三日三夜在大魚的腹中，人子也要照樣三日三夜在地裡。

ccb.text: 约拿在大鱼腹中三日三夜，人子也要在地里三日三夜。

csbs.text: 就是说，正如约拿在大鱼的肚子里三天三夜，人子也照样将要在地心三天三夜。
